# Architecture Decision Records

<!-- Generated by seed-golden-context | Last updated: 2026-05-11 -->

This directory contains Architecture Decision Records (ADRs) for `contentful-management.php`. Each ADR documents a significant technical or architectural choice: the context it was made in, what was decided, and the trade-offs accepted.

## Index

| ADR | Title | Status |
|---|---|---|
| [0001](./0001-extend-contentful-core-base-client.md) | Extend contentful/core BaseClient Instead of Implementing HTTP from Scratch | Accepted |
| [0002](./0002-proxy-pattern-for-space-and-environment.md) | Proxy Pattern for Space and Environment Scoped Operations | Accepted |
| [0003](./0003-api-configuration-central-registry.md) | Central ApiConfiguration Registry for URI Templates | Accepted |
| [0004](./0004-php-vcr-cassettes-for-integration-tests.md) | php-vcr Cassette Recordings for Integration Tests | Accepted |
| [0005](./0005-devcontainer-for-reproducible-dev-and-ci.md) | Dev Container as the Canonical Development and CI Environment | Accepted |
| [0006](./0006-drop-php-7-require-php-8.md) | Drop PHP 7.x Support, Require PHP 8.0+ | Accepted |

## Adding a New ADR

Copy the template below, increment the number, and open a PR that includes both the ADR and the code change it documents.

```markdown
# ADR NNNN: Title

## Status
Proposed | Accepted | Superseded by [NNNN](./NNNN-...)

## Context
What problem or decision was faced?

## Decision
What was chosen and why?

## Consequences
Trade-offs, follow-up work, what this enables/prevents.
```
